name: spec-driven
description: Spec-driven development workflow with structured requirements, design, and task phases

agents.name: spec-scanner
agents.description: Scans a codebase to detect framework, patterns, entities, and registration points. Produces a persistent project profile.

commands.name: spec-scan
commands.description: Trigger a full codebase scan and update the project profile

commands.name: spec-debug
commands.description: Diagnose and fix bugs with spec context awareness and regression tracking
